nasb.text: Then they came to Elim where there were twelve springs of water and seventy date palms, and they camped there beside the waters.

esv.text: Then they came to Elim, where there were twelve springs of water and seventy palm trees, and they encamped there by the water.

cnv.text: 後來他們到了以琳，那裡有十二股水泉，七十棵棕樹。他們就在那裡靠近水邊的地方安營。

ccb.text: 到了以琳，那里有十二股水泉和七十棵棕树，他们就在水边安营。
